name: Emma Lynn's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour once into a medium bowl and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter until light yellow and smooth. Add sugar and beat again.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Pour in about 2 cups of the flour, then beat. Beat in the remainder of the cake flour.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured tube pan. Bake for 1½ hours (350°F). Use a cake tester to check for doneness.
6. Cool on a rack for 15 minutes before turning out to cool thoroughly.
Makes 1 10-inch pound cake.
